LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE FEB-02-2023 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF GABRIEL ESPINOZA'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-27-2023 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-26-2023 Continued To Mar-22-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Feb-02-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. ANDREW V. JABLON, Esq. of Resch Polster & Berger LLP (Tel: 310-277-8300) for defendant Trade Lines, Inc.;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF GABRIEL ESPINOZA's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement and [proposed] consent judgment" is granted.

Order signed. Consent Judgment signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
